privacy_policy: District/school aggregate only. No student names, class rows, certificates, teacher names, IDs, project abstracts, or original spreadsheets.
methodology: Aggregates local event notices and award/shortlist materials by district, event category, school occurrence, award terms, grade/stage, and project category. Counts are helper signals, not official participation or award totals.
